report.summary: Cycle-close v20: Publish queue fully drained — all pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (845 lines, ~540+ unique slugs). 4 ecosystem pages (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Ondo) missing metadata — SEO regression flagged. Disk full in sandbox blocks bash/build verification. Git index.lock status unknown (bash unavailable). 6/6 API routes structurally healthy.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PUBLISH_QUEUE is now empty — all pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES as of 2026-03-25
Published pages file: 845 lines covering ~540+ unique slugs across 21 batches today
Sampled 6 recent pages (tokenized-real-estate, web3-gaming, crypto-portfolio-allocation, ecosystem/pendle, erc-8183-agentic-commerce, bitcoin-safe-haven) — all have page.tsx files
SEO REGRESSION: 4 ecosystem pages from batch 3 (pendle, rocketpool, makerdao, ondo) are 'use client' with NO metadata export and NO layout.tsx — missing title, description, OG tags, structured data
ecosystem/yearn is correctly structured (server component with metadata export + client component split)
Most learn guide pages have proper Metadata exports, StructuredData components, Breadcrumbs, and BackToTop
solver-networks-order-flow-auctions page is 'use client' but has layout.tsx with metadata — correctly handled
Cannot run build verification — disk full prevents bash execution
Cannot verify live page HTTP status — degen0x.com egress-blocked from this environment

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API route files present and unchanged from v19: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs: prices 60s, trending 300s, fear-greed 600s, market-metrics 60s, market-dominance 300s, defi-yields 300s
All routes follow standard pattern: in-memory cache → external API fetch → stale cache fallback
market-metrics and market-dominance have hardcoded fallback data — best practice
prices and fear-greed lack hardcoded fallback (502 on cold start if API is down) — carry-over improvement
Rate limiter wired into /api/health only — 0/6 core routes protected (carry-over P1 from v19)
CoinGecko free tier still in use — no API key rotation, rate limit risk persists
Cannot verify live API responses (egress blocked) — no data freshness check this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: next.config.ts: standalone output, 8GB memory, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, ignoreBuildErrors=true — all stable
Middleware: 68 pillar pages get index/follow + aggressive caching; all others get noindex/follow — intentional SEO strategy unchanged
Security headers present: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy
Static assets: immutable caching (1 year) for _next/static/* — correct
BLOCKER from v19 (git index.lock) — cannot verify if resolved; bash unavailable due to disk full in sandbox
Cannot verify Vercel deployment status — no bash, no egress to degen0x.com or Vercel dashboard
Disk full in sandbox (/sessions tmp dir) — affects bash tool execution, not production site

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Major milestone: PUBLISH_QUEUE fully drained — all content is now promoted
Today's output: 21 publish/build batches covering ~44 new pages (learn guides, ecosystem deep-dives, comparison guides)
New content includes: ecosystem pages (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Yearn, Ondo), plus 39+ learn guides on topics from ERC-8183 to tokenized real estate
ACTION NEEDED: Fix metadata on 4 ecosystem pages (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Ondo) — add layout.tsx with Metadata export or refactor to server/client split like Yearn
BLOCKER carry-over: git index.lock (if still present), 120+ uncommitted files, needs manual intervention
BLOCKER carry-over: 154+ TS errors across 6+ files — shielded by ignoreBuildErrors but technical debt growing
Carry-over P1: Wire rate limiter into 6 core API routes
Carry-over P2: Build page.tsx for ~103 legacy published slugs missing pages
Next cycle priority: Fix ecosystem page metadata regression, clear git blocker, commit + deploy
